subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath made a herald of His Name, to exalt His Word at all times, who art ever mindful of that One Who draweth all unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من جعله الله منادیا باسمه اعلاء لکلمته در جمیع احیان بیاد آن منجذب الی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
